pi_items.source: Sygic GPS Navigation official documentation - View & Units settings menu. Multiple versions (20.x, 22.x, 24.3) confirm this setting name.

Sygic GPS Navigation official documentation from manula.com (versions 20.x, 22.x, and 24.3) explicitly state the distance units options are: 'Kilometers, Miles/Yards or Miles/Feet'. No version offers a standalone 'Miles' option.

privileged_info_summary: The Sygic GPS Navigation app contains a setting called 'Distance units' in the View & Units menu. The official documentation for all supported versions (including Android versions 20.x, 22.x, 24.3) confirms that the available distance unit options are Kilometers, Miles/Yards, and Miles/Feet. There is no standalone 'Miles' option available—users must select Miles paired with either Yards or Feet for shorter distances.
